question: How to install Packaging utility? How to install Packaging utility?
answer:
To install Packaging Utility, follow these steps:

1. On the Start page of Installation Manager, click Update Packages.
2. Select IBM Packaging Utility and follow the wizard pages to update.

Alternatively, you can download the installer package for Packaging Utility from the IBM repository using the following command:
pu.offering.disk.platform_version.zip

You must have Internet access, Installation Manager installed, and an IBM user name and password to access the repository.

answer:
To configure DC to look on a different App server for the SSP, you need to create your own SSP resolver and add it to the teamserver.war. Then, set the teamserver.defaultSSPResolver.class property to this class.

You can implement your own method IlrSSPResolver.getSSPURL(String serverName, URL url) to point to a different location than the default provider. The default provider uses the URL of the Rule Execution Server passed in parameter and replaces the application name with "testing".

question: What can the SOS Call button do?
answer: The SOS Call button allows you to make an emergency call, and in case of an error, there will be a 10-second delay before attempting to contact an SOS operator. The SOS operator may then attempt to open a voice connection with the vehicle to determine if additional help is needed or provide important vehicle information and GPS coordinates to emergency responders.

question: Can I changing the name of the TV on a network?
answer: Yes, you can change the name of the TV on a network by selecting "User Input" at the bottom of the list in Settings > General System Manager > Device Name.

question: Why is the file db2jcc.jar missing after an upgrade to BPM V8.5.7 CF2016.12? After upgrading to IBM Business Process Manager V8.5.7 Cumulative Fix 2016.12, I have encountered several JDBC related exceptions during my process application development. It seems that the file db2jcc.jar was removed during the installation of the cumulative fix pack. What happened?
answer: The file db2jcc.jar is missing after an upgrade to BPM V8.5.7 CF2016.12 because it was likely removed during the installation of the cumulative fix pack, as indicated by the error message "JDBC JAR file not found in its classpath". This suggests that the fix pack repository location for DB2 was not properly configured or set after the upgrade, leading to the removal of the necessary files.

question:
Why are the users unable to login to Web GUI 8.1 after I modify timeout to 2147483647 in security.xml file ? 

I followed the Web GUI 8.1 reference guide here to switching off the session timeout

http://www-01.ibm.com/support/knowledgecenter/SSSHTQ_8.1.0/com.ibm.netcool_OMNIbus.doc_8.1.0/webtop/wip/task/web_adm_settimeout.html

After I edited /config/cells/JazzSMNode01Cell/security.xml file, modified timeout setting to 2147483647, users are not able to login anymore.
answer: The users are unable to login to the Web GUI 8.1 because they are using a big value (2147483647) for the session timeout setting in DASH, which is causing a condition that prevents logins due to the limitations of JavaScript's settimeout function. This is not related to the security.xml file used by WebSphere Application Server, but rather a limitation of the JavaScript call used by DASH.

question:
Why is WebSphere MQ connection failing when enabling SSL with AMQ9640 SSLPEER peer name error? Why is WebSphere MQ connection failing when enabling SSL with AMQ9640 SSLPEER peer name error?
example client side error:com.ibm.mq.jmqi.JmqiException: CC=2;RC=2399;
 
AMQ9640: SSL invalid peer name, channel '?',
 
attribute 'OID.0.9.2342.19200300.100.1.3 (x2)'.
answer: The WebSphere MQ connection is failing when enabling SSL with AMQ9640 SSLPEER peer name error because the distinguished name values in the certificate contain a slash (/), which causes an MQ parsing error and prevents the SSL handshake from occurring. To resolve this issue, generate certificates with distinguished name values that do not contain a slash.

question: What is special about power windows?

question:
How to resolve the StaleConnectionException in WebSphere Application Server? I see this exception in WebSphere Application Server J2c and RRA traces:

WSRdbManagedC > preTestConnection Entry WSRdbManagedConnectionImpl@51a507f2 query: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WSRdbManagedC 3 Exception java.sql.SQLException: ORA-02396: exceeded maximum idle time, please connect again DSRA0010E: SQL State = 61000, Error Code = 2,396 at oracle.jdbc.driver.T4CTTIoer.processError(T4CTTIoer.java:440) at 
...
Entry java.sql.S...(+143 chars)
answer:
To resolve the StaleConnectionException in WebSphere Application Server, you can try the following:

* Set the Minimum connections to 0 to avoid situations where a connection is kept in the pool to meet the minimum requirement, even though it may have been idle for longer than Unused timeout.
* Set the values for Unused timeout and Reap timeout so that they are not too low.

Additionally, you can check the WebSphere log file for any errors related to stale connections. The error message indicate...(+530 chars)

question: Explain the steps how to do Schedule Recording while watching a program?
answer:
To schedule a recording of a program while watching it, follow these steps:

1. Press the button while watching the program.
2. A menu will appear with options: Record, Timeshift, Stop, and Info.
3. Select "Record" from the menu to start recording the program immediately.
4. Alternatively, select "Schedule Recording" from the menu.

question: Can I perform a silent install of fix packs for IIB or WMB Toolkit? How do I perform a silent install of fix packs for IBM Integration Bus (IIB) or WebSphere Message Broker (WMB) Toolkit?
answer:
To perform a silent install of fix packs for IBM Integration Bus (IIB) or WebSphere Message Broker (WMB) Toolkit, you can use the msiexec command in the following format:

msiexec parameters [USEINI=" response-file "] [TRANSFORMS=" transform_file "]

Note that this installation method is not affected by the DLL-planting vulnerability mentioned in security bulletin [3].

question: Where do I find the list of my favorite channels?
answer: You can view your favorite channels by pressing the right directional button on your remote control, selecting "Favorites", and then selecting the desired list among the five favorites lists on the screen.

question:
How to refresh a DataPower WebService Proxy which WSDL got changed? I have made changes to a WSDL stored in DP local filesystem.

How can I make the WSP reflect this change since DataPower Gateway 7.1.0 WebService Proxy WebGUI doesn't offer the "Refresh" button anymore?

Is there a best practice to refresh the WSP if I modified my WSDL?
answer: To refresh a DataPower Web Service Proxy which WSDL got changed, you can disable and re-enable the service. This will cause the WSDL cache to be refreshed, reflecting any changes made to the local WSDL file.

question: how to set up Android Auto?

2. Connect your Android-powered smartphone to one of the media USB ports in your vehicle using the factory-provided USB cable.

question:
We got a NullPointerException when bootstrapping the object store or accessing Site Preferences/Access Role on WorkplaceXT 

After logging into FileNet Workplace XT, a java.lang.NullPointerException error is logged when bootstrapping the object store or when accessing Site Preferences/Access Role.

Here's the error stack,

Error Stack Trace extracted from the J2EE Application Server error log:

java.lang.NullPointerException

at org.apache.jasper.runtime.JspWriterImpl.write(JspWriterImpl.java:42...(+462 chars)
answer:
RESOLVING THE PROBLEM
The Operating System user starting the J2EE application server needs to be able to read / write to the location identified as the "configurationDirectory" in web.xml, otherwise a NullPointerException may be displayed. Adjust file system / network share permissions as to allow access to this directory.
